title: Opportunity for a monday.com Implementation Specialist

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m the founder of Kick Consulting, a Silver monday.com channel partner from Australia. Due to rapid growth, we are seeking an experienced monday.com specialist to join our team.

At Kick, we deliver customised solutions to businesses that are going from chaos to streamlined, scalable systems.

We’re after confident, capable professionals who can jump in and help with:

  • Client project scoping sessions and training
  • Workflow and solution design
  • Full monday.com implementations
  • Support
  • Bonus points if you have experience with Make.com or Zapier.

What we offer :

  • Flexible, remote work
  • Project-based hours to suit your schedule
  • Competitive rates
  • Access to certification pathways and real-world client work
  • A collaborative, knowledgeable team that’s committed to simplifying tech for our clients

We value reliable, resourceful people who genuinely care about getting businesses humming with better systems.

Interested? Fill out this form and we’ll be in touch with the next steps.

Want to see the kind of work we do? Check out kickconsulting.com.au.

Elena from Kick

(www.kickconsulting.com.au)
